saved.phase1Body: Saving reports will be available in a future update.

analysis.shortDescription: A small decorative object with visible hand-finished details and collector appeal.

period.label: Mid-20th century
period.reasoning: The form, surface finish, and visible wear are consistent with post-war studio or small-batch production.

condition.obsMulti1: General surface wear appears consistent with age.
condition.obsMulti2: No major structural damage is visible in the supplied photos.
condition.obsSingle: Condition confidence is limited until more angles are supplied.

quality.item1: Check for chips along rims, corners, handles, and feet.
quality.item2: Inspect the base for maker marks, stamps, labels, or hand signatures.
quality.item3: Ask whether any cracks, repairs, or repainting are present.

missingPhoto.mark: Close-up of maker's mark, stamp, signature, or base
missingPhoto.back: Back or underside photo to inspect construction and wear
missingPhoto.damage: Close-up of any chips, cracks, repairs, or stains

travel.item1: Pack with rigid support and padding around protruding edges.
travel.item2: Keep receipts and seller details for customs questions when travelling.

sellerQuestion.item1: Do you know the maker, studio, or previous owner?
sellerQuestion.item2: Has the piece had any repairs or restoration?

decision.reasonPortable: The item appears portable and has enough decorative appeal to justify closer inspection.
decision.reasonDkkAssumption: Suggested max price assumes DKK until a seller currency is provided.
decision.reasonWithSellerCurrency: Suggested max price uses the seller currency supplied in context.
decision.riskAttribution: Attribution is provisional without a clear maker mark.
decision.riskCondition: Condition issues can materially change the valuation.

summary.initial: Here is your first valuation snapshot.
summary.answerUpdated: I've updated the report with your answer.
summary.photosUpdated: I've updated the report with the new photos.

notFound.title: Report not found
notFound.body: This report is not loaded in the app anymore.

field.missingPhotoChecklist: Photos needed for a better report

upsell.headline: Unlock Seller Mode
upsell.comingSoonMessage: Seller Mode payments and unlock are not available in this build yet.

confirm.title: Start a new analysis?
confirm.message: The current report and chat will be discarded.

start.requirePhotoPrompt: Upload a photo of the object to begin. For the best report, include the front, back/base, maker's mark, rim/edge, and any damaged areas.
start.photoRequiredReminder: Please attach at least one photo before I can generate a report.

error.analysisFailed: I could not update the report. Please try again.

followUp.askSellerPrice: What is the seller asking price?
followUp.askSellerPriceReason: Helps estimate whether the price is fair.
followUp.askBuyingCountry: Where are you buying this item?
followUp.askBuyingCountryReason: Affects import rules and authenticity context.
followUp.askHomeCountry: Where would you bring or sell it?
followUp.askHomeCountryReason: Needed to estimate carry-home cost and resale potential.
followUp.askMakersMarkPhoto: Can you upload a close-up of the maker’s mark?
followUp.askMakersMarkPhotoReason: A clear mark photo greatly improves attribution accuracy.
followUp.askConditionDetails: Do you see any chips, cracks, crazing, repairs, or stains?
followUp.askConditionDetailsReason: Condition directly affects value and risk.
